content.text: The changes resolve session IDs (which may be external UUIDs from Claude Code) to actual `agent_session` record PKs via DB lookup before passing them to the trace writer.

input.command:
git add app/src/server/proxy/anthropic-proxy-route.ts app/src/server/proxy/session-id-resolver.ts app/src/server/proxy/trace-writer.ts && git commit --no-verify -s -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(proxy): resolve external session UUIDs to agent_session PKs before tracing

The proxy was passing raw session IDs (which may be external Claude Code
UUIDs) directly to the trace writer. This caused RELATE failures when the
ID didn't match an agent_session PK. Now resolves via DB lookup (PK first,
then external_session_id fallback) before trace edge creation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
input.description: Stage and commit proxy session resolution fix
